address: 5725 Old National Hwy #1, College Park, GA 30349
brand_angle: College Park's go-to for flawless silk presses, sew-ins, and natural-hair artistry — finally with a brand as polished as the work.

services.title: Silk Press
services.desc: Sleek, frizz-free silk presses that leave natural hair smooth, shiny, and full of movement.

services.title: Sew-In & Weave Extensions
services.desc: Custom sew-ins and micro-link installs for length, volume, and a seamless, natural finish.

services.title: Natural Hair Care
services.desc: Healthy-hair treatments, conditioning, and styling tailored to natural textures and protective looks.
